message:
fix(render-term): remove redundant activation bar dimension guard and add test

Remove the bw > 0 && bh > 0 guard around draw_rect for activation bars
since draw_rect already clamps dimensions via .max(1), making the check
redundant and causing tiny-but-valid bars to be silently dropped.

Add tiny_scaled_activation_bars_still_render test that creates a minimal
sequence diagram layout with a small activation bar and verifies the
terminal renderer produces non-whitespace output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
